name: ZignSec AB (publ)
summary: ZignSec AB (publ) operates an identity service platform for companies to identify their customers digitally in real-time. The company's platform offers a range of digital verification methods, such as electronic identities, online ID scanning, register checks, PEP and sanction checks, real-time payments, phone number validation, banking API, income analysis, and real-time AML check. It serves the iGaming, funds, brokerage and pension, and e-commerce companies, as well as banks and financial institutions. The company was founded in 2015 and is based in Solna, Sweden.
